row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a multi-lane road with slight rightward drift or lane change.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A black car on the left moves forward and slightly right; a white bus ahead maintains straight trajectory; construction barriers remain static.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with modern buildings, active traffic, and roadside construction. Road has multiple lanes with clear markings.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth motion of vehicles; no sudden jumps or discontinuities. Temporal flow is consistent across frames.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain continuous presence without disappearance or duplication. Pedestrians move naturally along sidewalk.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and barrier positions remain stable and coherent over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily, maintaining lane position with minor adjustments.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Construction zone is bordered by barriers; pedestrian activity is distant and non-interfering.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with reduced clarity and some structural distortions. Buildings and roads appear slightly warped.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects are present but exhibit blurring, edge softening, and occasional ghosting. Some details (e.g., text on signs, fine textures) are lost.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears generally smooth but exhibits subtle flickering in object edges and background structures. Minor temporal jitter observed.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist continuously, though some show slight positional drift or shape deformation between frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Road and building outlines occasionally warp or bend unnaturally, especially near horizon and distant structures.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with similar trajectory to reference, though path may appear slightly less stable due to visual artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability due to artifacts may impair downstream perception systems. No overt risk event visible, but confidence in object detection may be lowered.

artifacts_or_instabilities: reduced contrast in shadows and highlights
